evidence: The paper uses SHAP values exclusively for feature importance ranking: "Aggregated SHAP values can be used to rank the importance of each predictor variable for classification, providing a global and abstract view of the model." The authors considered partial dependence plots as an alternative but "focused on SHAP" and validated their interpretations with PGI/PGU faithfulness metrics. Since the paper does not employ impurity-based importance (Gini/MDI), the impurity importance bias does not affect this study, and the magnitude/ranking conclusions are grounded in SHAP-based methods with corroboration through held-out validation and external real-world dataset testing.
